creator: dom@phmit.demon.co.uk
text:
This is an update of the xscreensaver port to 3.00, the latest.  I've
taken out the patch which prevents it from using passwords (not sure why
it was there...).  It gets installed root, so it can read the password
file.  Personally, I like this.

Fix: Shar file below:
How-To-Repeat: 
The usual.
